title: betula pubescens var. fragrans
intro: Betula pubescens var. fragrans, also known as fragrant birch, is a variant of the downy birch tree (Betula pubescens) characterized by its distinctive fragrance and smaller leaves. The medicinal properties of Betula pubescens var. fragrans include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include relief from arthritis, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as a natural detoxifier and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Betula pubescens var. fragrans include tea, infusions, and salves, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds, or internally to promote overall well-being.
